questions.question: Area of the circle r = 2a cos θ is ______.

options.A: ax secθ - by cosecθ = a² - b²
options.B: ax cosθ + by sinθ = a² + b²

questions.question: In 3D, locus of a point at constant distance from a fixed line is a ______.
Locus of point P which is equidistant from (a+b, a-b) and (a-b, a+b).
Locus of the pole of line y = mx + c w.r.t. parabola y²=4ax is?

options.A: my = 2a(x + a/m²) — a parabola similar to original

questions.question: The locus of a point P such that the sum of the squares of its distances from the points (a,0) and (-a,0) is 2c² is ______.

Locus of point equally inclined to two given intersecting lines is?

options.A: the angle bisectors of those lines
